rpnScale.occurrence: 1=remote (<1:1M) .. 10=very high (>1:10); Rust type-system-enforced failures score O=1
rpnScale.detection: 1=certain (compiler/static) .. 10=none; dedicated unit test scores D=2; CI gate D=3

entries.failureMode: Accepts domain outside [0,232]
entries.effect: Participant created with invalid domain; routing undefined
entries.detectionMethod: validate_domain() guards entry; domain_out_of_range test

entries.failureMode: Off-by-one error: accepts 233 or rejects 232
entries.effect: Valid domain rejected or invalid domain accepted
entries.detectionMethod: Explicit boundary tests Domain(232)=PASS, Domain(233)=FAIL
entries.action: none — boundary tests cover both sides

entries.failureMode: writer_guid encoded incorrectly (wrong hex length)
entries.effect: Receiver cannot extract GUID; replay detection fails
entries.detectionMethod: Golden vector test sample_to_message_golden_vector
entries.action: none — golden vector test is deterministic

entries.failureMode: Payload bytes corrupted during clone
entries.effect: Subscriber receives wrong data — ASIL-C safety violation (HAZ-002)
entries.detectionMethod: payload_integrity_byte_for_byte test; Vec::clone is bit-identical by Rust specification
entries.action: none — safe Rust clone is formally guaranteed

entries.failureMode: GUID field missing in meta — error returned or all-zeros GUID used
entries.effect: Caller receives unexpected error or zero GUID; replay detection impaired
entries.detectionMethod: Requirement-traced unit test for from_message
entries.action: none — explicit test covers missing-field case

entries.failureMode: GUID hex string wrong length — not caught before decode
entries.effect: Corrupt writer_guid stored; replay detection confused
entries.detectionMethod: hex::decode returns Err on wrong length; validated in from_message

entries.failureMode: New Error variant added without adding an as_relay match arm
entries.effect: Variant silently maps to wrong sentinel; caller misinterprets error class
entries.detectionMethod: Non-exhaustive match is a compiler error in Rust; caught at build time

entries.failureMode: AccessDenied mapped to wrong sentinel (e.g. Timeout instead of NotConnected)
entries.effect: Authorization failure appears as transport/network error to caller
entries.detectionMethod: Explicit unit test: AccessDenied → NotConnected mapping
entries.action: none — specific mapping test in error.rs

entries.failureMode: Back-pressure policy not applied — queue grows unbounded under DropNewest
entries.effect: Memory exhaustion; OOM crash in safety-critical context (HAZ-001)
entries.detectionMethod: drop_newest_does_not_exceed_capacity test; explicit policy match arm
entries.action: none — capacity test verifies invariant on every CI run

entries.failureMode: Delivers sample to closed or unsubscribed subscriber channel
entries.effect: Stale data delivered after subscriber lifecycle ends
entries.detectionMethod: unsubscribed/closed guard checked at push() entry before any queue access
entries.action: none — guard is first expression in push()

entries.failureMode: DropOldest drops newest entry instead of oldest
entries.effect: Sample ordering violated; replay detection inconsistent
entries.detectionMethod: drop_oldest_makes_room verifies 'b','c' retained not 'a','b'
entries.action: none — explicit ordering assertion in test

entries.failureMode: close() sets flag but does not call notify_waiters() — recv() blocks forever
entries.effect: Subscriber stuck; task leak in safety-critical system
entries.detectionMethod: notify_waiters() in close(); unsubscribe_closes_channel_so_recv_returns_none
entries.action: none — test uses 100ms timeout to confirm non-blocking

entries.failureMode: unsubscribe() sets unsubscribed flag but does not call close() — recv() blocks
entries.effect: §6.4 violation: recv() never returns None; application hangs indefinitely
entries.detectionMethod: unsubscribe() explicitly calls self.close(); regression test for §6.4
entries.action: none — regression test added after §6.4 fix; FMEA entry documents the fix

entries.failureMode: Race: pop() returns None, closed check sees false, Notify fires before notified() — wakeup missed
entries.effect: recv() sleeps forever despite data in queue; task leak
entries.detectionMethod: Tokio Notify semantics: notify_one() between pop() and notified() is not lost; verified by Tokio correctness guarantee
entries.action: Add comment citing Tokio Notify documentation; review if switching from Notify to channel in future

entries.failureMode: Final drain after close() returns stale sample out-of-order
entries.effect: Application processes samples in wrong order after close
entries.detectionMethod: VecDeque is FIFO; sequence_numbers_monotonic test verifies order

entries.failureMode: Accepts invalid domain — validate_domain not called
entries.effect: Participant in illegal domain; routing undefined (HAZ-004)
entries.detectionMethod: validate_domain() first call in new(); domain_out_of_range test

entries.failureMode: Sample delivered to subscriber on different topic (wrong HashMap key)
entries.effect: Cross-topic contamination — ASIL-B safety violation (HAZ-003)
entries.detectionMethod: HashMap exact-key match; topic_isolation_no_cross_delivery test
entries.action: none — dedicated isolation test on every CI run

entries.failureMode: Closed subscriber not removed — retain() predicate wrong direction
entries.effect: Delivery to dead subscriber; resource leak; potential panic on stale Arc
entries.detectionMethod: retain() checks !sub.closed.load(); subscriber_close tests exercise this

entries.failureMode: Two participants on different domains subscribe to same broker
entries.effect: Cross-domain message leakage — ASIL-B safety violation (HAZ-004)
entries.detectionMethod: Each MockParticipant owns Arc<Broker>; domain_isolation_no_cross_domain_delivery test

entries.failureMode: write() succeeds after Publisher::close() — closed flag not checked
entries.effect: Stale/unauthorized data published after publisher closed (HAZ-007)
entries.detectionMethod: closed.load(SeqCst) as first expression in write(); write_after_close test

entries.failureMode: Sequence number not incremented — fetch_add returns old value incorrectly
entries.effect: Duplicate sequence numbers; replay detection confused
entries.detectionMethod: AtomicU64::fetch_add is guaranteed by Rust; sequence_numbers_monotonic test

entries.failureMode: Expired context not detected — ctx.done() returns false incorrectly
entries.effect: Late data delivered to subscribers; timing contract violated
entries.detectionMethod: ctx.done() uses Instant comparison; write_ctx_timeout test uses 1ns deadline

entries.failureMode: close() not idempotent — second call panics or corrupts state
entries.effect: Double-close from concurrent tasks causes undefined participant state
entries.detectionMethod: AtomicBool::store(true) is idempotent; participant_close_is_idempotent test
entries.action: Consider upgrading to compare_exchange for ASIL-D; acceptable at ASIL-B

entries.failureMode: Publisher created after participant close — no Closed error returned
entries.effect: Publisher active but participant dead; samples may be lost silently
entries.detectionMethod: closed.load() at entry of new_publisher(); new_publisher_after_close test

entries.failureMode: Subscriber created after participant close — recv() may block forever
entries.effect: Open channel with dead participant; application hangs
entries.detectionMethod: closed.load() at entry of new_subscriber(); closed_state_is_irreversible test

entries.failureMode: relay::Node::subscribe called with opts.topic = None — task spawned with empty routing
entries.effect: Forwarding task receives all messages; subscriber receives unrelated data
entries.detectionMethod: topic guard checks opts.topic.is_some(); subscribe_without_topic test

entries.failureMode: Back-pressure policy not forwarded — relay mpsc blocks even under DropNewest
entries.effect: relay adapter blocks caller async task indefinitely (HAZ-001 at relay level)
entries.detectionMethod: policy captured before task spawn; try_send path for DropNewest/DropOldest

entries.failureMode: meta is HashMap — non-deterministic key iteration across runs
entries.effect: Byte-identical comparison of two Message values fails spuriously (§18.3 violation)
entries.detectionMethod: BTreeMap used per §18.3; meta_ordering_is_deterministic test
entries.action: none — fixed; BTreeMap enforces sorted order

entries.failureMode: Expired context returns false — write_ctx proceeds past deadline
entries.effect: Late data published after caller-specified deadline
entries.detectionMethod: Instant::now() >= deadline comparison; write_ctx_timeout with 1ns deadline

entries.failureMode: Background context (no deadline) returns true — all write_ctx calls fail
entries.effect: All Publisher::write_ctx calls return Error::Timeout when using background context
entries.detectionMethod: background() sets deadline = None; done() returns false for None deadline

entries.failureMode: capacity silently clamped to 256 — caller receives smaller queue than configured
entries.effect: Premature back-pressure; samples dropped earlier than application expects
entries.detectionMethod: Clamp documented in code and SAFETY_MANUAL Known Limitations
entries.action: Expose actual capacity via an accessor in future release

entries.failureMode: Returns stale payloads after reset() call (reset not effective)
entries.effect: Test assertion uses stale data; incorrect test outcome
entries.detectionMethod: written_payloads_log test verifies reset() clears log

entries.failureMode: Returns None when sample is present — race with concurrent push
entries.effect: Caller believes queue empty; sample silently lost
entries.detectionMethod: Mutex lock at start of pop() ensures coherent view; try_recv_non_blocking test

entries.failureMode: relay_spec_version field emitted (disallowed by §12.1)
entries.effect: relay conform --strict FAIL; §20.1.1 CI gate blocks all PRs
entries.detectionMethod: struct uses spec_version field; relay-conform CI gate on every PR

entries.failureMode: Required §12.2 field omitted (e.g. optional_interfaces)
entries.effect: Schema validation fails; relay-conform CI blocks PR
entries.detectionMethod: All §12.2 fields present; relay-conform CI gate

entries.failureMode: Disallowed ok field emitted instead of healthy boolean (§12.3)
entries.effect: §12.3 schema validation fails; relay-conform FAIL
entries.detectionMethod: struct uses healthy bool; relay-conform CI gate

entries.failureMode: rustc not on PATH at build time — RUSTC_VERSION is empty string
entries.effect: runtime field in §12.1 JSON output is empty; conformance degrades
entries.detectionMethod: unwrap_or_else provides fallback 'rustc unknown'; release-build CI gate

entries.failureMode: Cache delivers more than history_depth samples to a late-joining subscriber
entries.effect: Subscriber overwhelmed with stale data; QoS contract violated
entries.detectionMethod: push_to_cache enforces history_depth limit with pop_front; transient_local test

entries.failureMode: Deadlock: Broker Mutex held while SubInner Mutex acquired in same call stack
entries.effect: System hangs; safety function cannot complete
entries.detectionMethod: Single-lock protocol: Broker lock dropped before SubInner.push() acquires its lock; concurrent_publish_subscribe_no_deadlock test
entries.action: Document single-lock protocol invariant explicitly; consider lock-order analysis tool in future

entries.failureMode: meta key ordering non-deterministic between runs or platforms
entries.effect: Byte-identical message comparison fails; RELAY protocol conformance lost
entries.detectionMethod: BTreeMap guarantees lexicographic sorted order; meta_ordering_is_deterministic test
